## prompt-2-template-selection

*Generated by Process A from `auto-bill-01/sub-prompts/prompt-2-template-selection.md`,
adapted for the single-prompt v5.0 financial-data build.*

Select exactly one LaTeX bill file set to base the v5.0 Financial Data
Amendment on. The two candidates are the two finished ancestors: (a)
`cancer-automated/tree/main/papers/VVUQ-05/final-bill` - the Bill v3.0 visual
amendment, whose `usctitle.sty` v3.1.0 carries the congressional amendment
apparatus, the full-width ragged-right table columns, and the centered
white-background `asciifig`/`asciifigsmall` monospace figure primitives, with
eight section files and the deliverables excluded by the Master prompt ("no
/deliverables"); and (b) `single-prompt-bill/tree/main/auto-bill-01/final-bill`
- the Bill v4.0 gray-scale Mermaid amendment, whose `usctitle.sty` v4.0.0
replaces the ASCII primitive with the gray-scale `mermaidfig` TikZ environment
and the five-step gray palette. Inspect each candidate's `main.tex`,
`usctitle.sty`, and at least one section file, and justify the choice against
this build's needs: the bill must carry **tables, ASCII, and Mermaid together**
(Master prompt objective (b)), must keep the operative amendment apparatus, and
must compile in Overleaf with pdfLaTeX and no images.

State explicitly how the unselected candidate is still used: whichever set is
chosen as the base, the v5.0 `usctitle.sty` must merge both visual primitives
(the v3.0 `asciifig` and the v4.0 `mermaidfig`) plus the financial additions
the new bill needs (a right-aligned numeric column type for dollar tables and
the boxed-statement device for the budgetary-effects clause). Map each part of
the v5.0 bill (five sections, five appendices) to the medium genre it will
lead with, so Stage 3 and Stage 4 can fill the slots.

Output `auto-bill-02/02-template-selection/output-2-template-selection.md` plus
a directory `README.md` naming the upstream files used. Commit each file
separately and push in real time within stage milestone M3 of the single pull
request. Do not stall, ask questions, or go into plan mode.
